title: SanMar Purchase Order (NWCA canonical payload)
description: Vendor-neutral internal shape for a SanMar blank-goods purchase order. This is the document that 'becomes a PO': it is human-fillable AND machine-convertible into a SanMar Standard submitPO SOAP body (see templates/submitPO.soap.xml) or PromoStandards sendPO. Sourced from SanMar PO Integration Guide v24.3. Build one of these per SanMar PO, then a builder maps it to the SOAP envelope. RULE: no field may contain a comma in the FTP flat-file path (comma is SanMar's delimiter); SOAP path is comma-safe but keep data clean anyway.

_comment.description: Free-text note for humans editing this file. Ignored by any builder.

poNumber.description: Your PO number. <=28 chars, alphanumeric + dashes, MUST be unique per submission, NO commas. SanMar recommends a date+batch convention e.g. 06-23-2026-1. Once submitted via API you OWN this number -> exact linkage back to SanMar_Orders (kills the style+date fuzzy matching in proxy sanmar-orders.js).

orderDate.description: ISO date-time of the PO, e.g. 2026-06-23T00:00:00. Used by PromoStandards sendPO (orderDate); optional for Standard submitPO.

shipTo.description: Becomes CustInfo (FTP) / the ship block (SOAP). For decorate-in-house, this is the NWCA decorator address; for drop-ship, the end customer. Use SanMar street abbreviations: ST, AVE, RD, DR, BLVD.

attention.description: Receiver's name or PO ref. Optional.

companyName.description: Ship-to company name. <=28 chars (PromoStandards limit tightened to 28 in Sep 2025).

zip.description: 5 digits or 5-4. Add preceding zeros if needed (min 5 chars).

email.description: Order confirmation + shipment notification email. Optional but recommended; falls back to the account default if omitted.

residence.description: Is the ship-to a residence? Y or N.

shipMethod.description: Standard ship method OR a will-call warehouse code. Common: 'UPS' (Ground), 'UPS 2ND DAY', 'UPS NEXT DAY', 'USPS PP' (Ground Advantage), 'USPS APP' (Priority), 'PSST', 'TRUCK' (orders >200 lb). Will-call codes (require Warehouse Selection account mode): PRE=Seattle, CIN, COP=Dallas, REN=Reno, NJE, JAC, MSP, PHX, VA1. NWCA's closest = PRE (Seattle). NOTE: free ground freight on orders >$200 continental US (excl. bags).

warehouseSelection.description: Leave null unless your SanMar account is configured for Warehouse Selection mode (required for will-call). If set, SanMar ships every line from this warehouse # and will hold the order if any line is short there. Valid IDs: 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,12,31. Pre-check stock with the inventory service first.

rush.description: PromoStandards sendPO only (rush flag). Ignored by Standard submitPO.

notes.description: Order notes. DISCOURAGED by SanMar (may delay processing). Leave empty unless absolutely necessary. No commas (FTP path).

lines.description: Order line items. IMPORTANT: consolidate duplicate products into ONE line with the summed qty — SanMar checks stock per line and duplicate lines can source from a short warehouse / error the PO.

items.description: Line identity: SanMar accepts EITHER (inventoryKey + sizeIndex) OR (style + color + size). Always populate style+color+size (buildable from Caspio today). Add inventoryKey+sizeIndex when available (SanMar-recommended, fewer errors) — resolve them via the Standard getPricing service or the SDL/EPDD files. See FIELD-MAPPING.md.

style.description: SanMar style #, same as the catalog style. e.g. PC61. From Caspio STYLE.

color.description: MUST be the SANMAR_MAINFRAME_COLOR (SanMar's mainframe/order color key), NOT the customer-facing COLOR_NAME. From Caspio Sanmar_Bulk.SANMAR_MAINFRAME_COLOR. Usually equals CATALOG_COLOR but can differ — verify via the catalog-color-audit endpoint. e.g. 'Charcoal'.

size.description: Human-readable size, e.g. S, M, L, XL, 2XL. From Caspio SIZE. (This is NOT the ShopWorks _2X/_3XL suffix and NOT sizeIndex.)

inventoryKey.description: OPTIONAL/preferred. SanMar 6-digit per-style+color internal id. Resolve via getPricing(style,color,size) or SDL/EPDD. Not stored in Caspio today.

sizeIndex.description: OPTIONAL/preferred. SMALL ORDINAL: 1=XS, 2=S, 3=M, 4=L, 5=XL, 6+=2XL.. (confirm 2XL+ from live getPricing). NOT a hundreds scheme. Resolve via getPricing. Not stored in Caspio today.

quantity.description: Total qty for this consolidated line.
